content.verdict: Huvafen Fushi pioneered the Maldives' first underwater spa and remains one of the most romantic islands in North Malé Atoll. With only 43 villas, a no-kids-under-12 policy, and an infinity pool that melts into the lagoon, it is honeymoon territory in its purest form.
content.best_room: The Ocean Pavilion — a standalone overwater villa with a glass-floor lounge, private infinity pool, and uninterrupted ocean view. For something different, the Beach Bungalow with Pool offers powdery-sand toes-in-the-water lounging.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival & Speedboat Transfer
itinerary_7_nights.description: 30-minute speedboat from Malé. Private check-in at your villa with Champagne and the signature Huvafen fragrance.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Underwater Spa Experience
itinerary_7_nights.description: Couples ritual in the world's first underwater treatment rooms, watching fish drift past during massage. Poolside lunch, sunset cocktail at Vinum wine cellar.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Reef & Sandbank Day
itinerary_7_nights.description: Guided house-reef snorkel (turtles guaranteed), private sandbank lunch drop-off, DJ sunset at Celsius infinity pool.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Dhoni Sunset Cruise
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning at leisure, afternoon Champagne dhoni cruise with dolphin spotting, in-villa Thai dinner.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Dive or Stargaze
itinerary_7_nights.description: Full-day dive trip to nearby HP Reef or lazy day in the pool. Astronomer-guided stargazing session after dinner.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Wine Cellar Dining
itinerary_7_nights.description: Cooking class with resort chef, degustation dinner in the underwater Vinum wine cellar — 6,000 bottles and Champagne tasting.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Farewell morning
itinerary_7_nights.description: Spa breakfast, final pool float, speedboat back to Malé.

caveats: Guests must be 12+ (not strictly adults-only, but feels like it)
Pricier dining and spa than comparable resorts
Proximity to Malé means occasional distant boat traffic

faqs.question: Good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: Exceptional — small, hushed, adult-leaning and famously romantic thanks to the underwater spa.

faqs.question: Best time to visit?
faqs.answer: December to March for dry, clear weather; September and October are wetter but offer great rates.

faqs.question: Book in advance?
faqs.answer: 6 months ahead; Ocean Pavilions sell out first.

faqs.question: Adults-only?
faqs.answer: Effectively yes — minimum age 12 and no kids club. Vibe is decidedly couples.

faqs.question: Best room type?
faqs.answer: Ocean Pavilion for pure overwater romance; Beach Bungalow with Pool for beach honeymooners.

faqs.question: How to get there?
faqs.answer: 30-minute speedboat transfer from Velana International Airport (MLE), running 24/7.
